meta.title: Te kēmu kupu o ia rā
meta.description: Matapakihia te kupu huna i roto i ngā ngana e 6 (iti iho rānei). He pakanga hou ia rā, ia rā!
meta.keywords: māori, pakanga, kupu, kēmu, ipurangi, matapaki, ia rā

unlimited.title: Play unlimited — no waiting
unlimited.description: Play unlimited Wordle in Maori. No waiting — get a new word every time.

speed.title: Speed Streak — race the clock
speed.description: Speed Streak: solve as many Wordle words in Maori as you can in 5 minutes.

dordle.title: Dordle — 2 boards at once
dordle.description: Play Dordle in Maori. Solve 2 Wordle boards at once with 7 guesses.

tridle.title: Tridle — 3 boards at once
tridle.description: Play Tridle in Maori. Solve 3 Wordle boards at once with 8 guesses.

quordle.title: Quordle — 4 boards at once
quordle.description: Play Quordle in Maori. Solve 4 Wordle boards at once with 9 guesses.

octordle.title: Octordle — 8 boards at once
octordle.description: Play Octordle in Maori. Solve 8 Wordle boards at once with 13 guesses.

sedecordle.title: Sedecordle — 16 boards at once
sedecordle.description: Play Sedecordle in Maori. Solve 16 Wordle boards at once with 21 guesses.

duotrigordle.title: Duotrigordle — 32 boards at once
duotrigordle.description: Play Duotrigordle in Maori. Solve 32 Wordle boards at once with 37 guesses.

text.no_attempts: You haven't tried any words yet!
text.share_challenge_win: I oti au te Wordle o tēnei rā i ngā ngana {n}. Ka taea e koe te hinga i ahau?
text.share_challenge_lose: Kāore au i te Wordle o tēnei rā. Ka taea e koe?
text.hard_mode_position: Aratau uaua: me noho {letter} ki te tūranga {position}
text.hard_mode_contains: Aratau uaua: me whai te matapaki i te {letter}

help.title: How to Play
help.text_1_2: Each guess must be a valid five letter word. Press the enter button to submit your guess.
help.text_1_3: After you guess, the tiles will change color to indicate which letters of your word are correct or almost correct.
help.text_2_1: is in the word and in the correct location!
help.text_2_2: is in the word, but not in the correct location.
help.text_2_3: is not present in the word you are trying to guess.
help.text_3: A new word will be available each day!
help.speed_explanation: You start with 5 minutes on the clock. Solve words to earn bonus time. Miss a word and you lose 30 seconds.
help.speed_scoring_explanation: Points = (7 − guesses) × 100 × combo multiplier. Consecutive solves build your combo up to 3x. A failed word resets your combo.
help.speed_pressure_explanation: Every 3 words solved, the timer speeds up. The longer you survive, the harder it gets.

seo.play_in_languages_sub: He kore utu ngā reo katoa. Kāore he pūkete e hiahiatia ana.
seo.why_wordle_global: He aha ai a Wordle Global
seo.footer: wordle.global — te kēmu kupu kore utu ia rā i ngā reo 80+
seo.tile_correct: kei roto i te kupu, ā, kei te tūranga tika.
seo.tile_semicorrect: kei roto i te kupu, engari kei te tūranga hē.
seo.tile_incorrect: kāore i roto i te kupu.

value_props.title: 80+ Ngā Reo
value_props.desc: Mai i te Ārapiki ki te Yoruba. Te Wordle reo-maha nui rawa atu.

value_props.title: Whakamārama Kupu
value_props.desc: Akohia te tikanga o ia kupu, o ia kupu i muri i te tākaro. Whakanuihia tō reo.

value_props.title: Toi Kupu Ahurei
value_props.desc: He whakaahua motuhake tō ia kupu. Kohikohia ngā mea katoa.

value_props.title: Aratau Pōuri me ngā Kaupapa
value_props.desc: Mārama, pōuri, me te taurereke nui mō te tākaro pai.

value_props.title: Ka Mahi i Ngā Wāhi Katoa
value_props.desc: PWA — tāutahia ki tētahi atu taputapu. Ka mahi tuimotu. Kāore he tikiake e hiahiatia ana.

value_props.title: Kore Utu Ake Ake
value_props.desc: Kāore he pūkete e hiahiatia ana. Kāore he tāwharau utu. Tākaro noa.

tips.title: Tīmataria ki he kupu oropuare-nui
tips.text: Ko ngā kupu pēnei i a CRANE, STARE, ADIEU ka whakamātau i ngā reta nui tere. Mā te mōhio ki ngā oropuare ka whāiti ngā kōwhiringa.

tips.title: Whakamahia ngā mea e mōhio ana koe
tips.text: Ka noho ngā reta kākāriki. Me neke ngā reta kōwhai. Ka mukua ngā reta kerei. Me whakamahi ngā tohutohu e toru i ia matapaki.

tips.title: Whakaarohia ngā tauira nui
tips.text: He nui ngā tauira i ngā reo rerekē — akohia. Ko ngā kupu Māori he rerekē te hanganga i te reo Ingarihi.

tips.title: Mukua, kaua e matapaki noa
tips.text: Ko tō matapaki tuarua me whakamātau i ngā reta hou, kaua e hoki ki ngā mea kua mōhiotia. Kia nui ngā oropuare me ngā orokati hou.

tips.title: Āta tirohia ngā reta tārua
tips.text: Ko ngā kupu pēnei i a CREEK, FLOSS, APPLE he māhanga nui. Mēnā kāore ō tohutohu e tika ana, whakaarohia he reta tārua.

tips.title: Whakamahia te aratau uaua hei whakapai
tips.text: Ka akiaki te aratau uaua kia whakamahia ngā tohutohu kua kitea i ia matapaki. Ka whakapai i ō tikanga ahakoa ka hoki ki te noa.

tips_speed.title: Tīmataria ki a CRANE, STARE rānei
tips_speed.text: Ko ngā reta nui-rawa ka whakarite i te tūponotanga pai rawa mō te whakatau tere. He mea nui ia hēkona.

tips_speed.title: Kaua e whakaaro roa
tips_speed.text: Ka utu a Speed Streak i te whakaaro tere. Mēnā ka kite koe i tētahi kupu pea, whāia — he nui ake te painga o te combo i te whakatau tino tika.

tips_speed.title: Tiakina tō combo
tips_speed.text: Ka whati te combo mēnā ka hē. Mēnā kāore koe e mōhio, whakamahia he matapaki haumaru kia nui ake ngā tohutohu.

tips_speed.title: Whāia ngā whakatau 2-3 matapaki
tips_speed.text: He nui te wā tāpiri mō ngā whakatau tere (+60s mō te 1, +30s mō te 2). Ka utu nui te matapaki tuarua mōrearea.

tips_speed.title: Akohia ngā mutunga kupu nui
tips_speed.text: Ka auau ngā tauira pēnei i -IGHT, -OUND, -ATCH. Mā te mōhio wawe ka penapena hēkona i ia kupu.

tips_speed.title: Kia mārie ahakoa ka piki te pēhanga
tips_speed.text: Ka tere ake te karaka i ia kupu e 3 ka oti. Ka hē ngā matapaki mēnā ka ohorere. He pai ake te āhua mārie.

tips_multiboard.title: Tīmataria whānui
tips_multiboard.text: Whakamahia ngā kupu reta-nui (CRANE, STARE) hei kohikohi tohutohu i ngā papa katoa.

tips_multiboard.title: Mātakitakihia te papapātuhi wehewehe
tips_multiboard.text: Ka whakaatu te papapātuhi i ngā tae mō ia papa. He reta kākāriki i tētahi papa, he kerei i tētahi atu, ka whāiti tere ngā kōwhiringa.

tips_multiboard.title: Arotahia ngā papa uaua
tips_multiboard.text: Arotahia ngā matapaki ki te papa kei te raru rawa. Ka ea pea ngā papa māmā i a rātou anō.

tips_multiboard.title: Kaua e moumou i ngā matapaki tuatahi
tips_multiboard.text: Whakamahia ngā matapaki 2-3 tuatahi ki ngā kupu mōhiohio-nui i mua i te arotahi ki ngā papa motuhake.

tips_multiboard.title: Rapua ngā reta ōrite
tips_multiboard.text: Mēnā e rua ngā papa e whakaatu ana i te E kōwhai, ka āwhina tētahi kupu whai E i tētahi tūranga hou i ngā papa e rua.

tips_multiboard.title: Rahuitia he matapaki mō te ohotata
tips_multiboard.text: Mēnā ka aukati koe i te papa whakamutunga, mā te matapaki toenga ka rerekē te toa me te hinga.

seo.mode_desc_classic: E 6 ō matapaki ki te kimi i tētahi kupu 5-reta huna. Whakamahia ngā tohutohu tae hei whāiti i te whakautu.
seo.mode_desc_unlimited: E 6 ō matapaki ki te kimi i tētahi kupu 5-reta huna. Whakamahia ngā tohutohu tae hei whāiti i te whakautu. I muri i ia kēmu, pēhia "Tākaro Anō" kia whiwhi kupu hou — kāore he tepe ia rā.
seo.mode_desc_speed: Ka tīmata ki te 3 meneti i runga i te karaka. Ka whiwhi koe i te wā tāpiri mō ia kupu ka oti — iti iho ngā matapaki, nui ake te wā (+60s mō te 1, +10s mō te 6). Ka ngaro 30 hēkona mēnā ka hē. Hangaia he combo mā te whakatau kupu ā-raupapa kia 3x te whakarea. Ka piki te pēhanga i ia kupu e 3 ka oti — ka tere ake te karaka.
seo.mode_desc_multiboard: Ka wero a {modeName} i a koe ki te whakatau i ngā papa Wordle e {boardCount} i te wā kotahi mā ngā matapaki e {maxGuesses} anake. Ka puta ia matapaki ki ngā papa katoa kāore anō kia ea. Ka tū maroke ngā papa kua ea. Ka whakaatu te papapātuhi tae-wehewehe i ngā reta tika mō ia papa. Tīmataria ki ngā kupu reta-nui hei kohikohi tohutohu i ngā papa katoa.

faq.q: Me pēhea au e tākaro ai i te Wordle i te reo {langName}?
faq.a: Haere ki wordle.global/{lang} ki te tākaro i te Wordle ia rā i te reo {langName}. E 6 ō matapaki ki te kimi i tētahi kupu 5-reta. I muri i ia matapaki, ka huri ngā tapawhā ki te kākāriki (reta tika, tūranga tika), kōwhai (reta tika, tūranga hē), kerei rānei (kāore te reta i roto).
Āe. Ka kōwhiria he kupu hou ia rā. Ka whiwhi ngā kaitākaro katoa i te reo kotahi i te kupu kotahi, nō reira ka taea e koe te whakataurite ki ō hoa.

faq.q: He kore utu a Wordle Global?
faq.a: Āe. Ko te pakanga ia rā, te aratau mutunga-kore, me ngā aratau kēmu katoa he kore utu i ngā reo 80+ katoa. Kāore he pūkete, kāore he tikiake e hiahiatia ana.

faq.q: Ka taea e au te tākaro nui ake i te kotahi ia rā?
faq.a: Āe — whakamātauria te aratau Mutunga-kore i wordle.global/{lang}/unlimited mō ngā kēmu mutunga-kore. Ka āta whai te raupapa ia rā.

unlimited.q: He aha te Wordle Mutunga-kore i te reo {langName}?
unlimited.a: Ka taea e koe te tākaro i ngā kēmu Wordle e hiahia ana koe i te reo {langName}, kāore e tatari ki te pakanga o āpōpō. Ka whiwhi koe i tētahi kupu hou ia kēmu ki te matapaki i ngā matapaki e 6.

unlimited.q: He kore utu te Wordle Mutunga-kore?
unlimited.a: Āe. He kore utu katoa a Wordle Mutunga-kore. Kāore he pūkete, kāore he tikiake, kāore he pānui i te wā tākaro.

unlimited.q: Ka pā te aratau mutunga-kore ki tōku raupapa ia rā?
unlimited.a: Kāo. He rerekē ngā tatauranga o te aratau mutunga-kore. Ka pā anake te pakanga ia rā ki tō raupapa ia rā.

unlimited.q: E hia ngā wā ka taea e au te tākaro?
unlimited.a: Kāore he tepe. Ka taea e koe te tākaro i ngā rauna e hiahia ana koe. I muri i ia kēmu, pēhia "Tākaro Anō" kia whiwhi kupu hou.

unlimited.q: Ko ēhea ngā reo ka taea te tākaro i te Wordle Mutunga-kore?
unlimited.a: Ka wātea te Wordle Mutunga-kore i ngā reo 80+ i wordle.global, tae atu ki te Ingarihi, Paniora, Tiamana, Hinerangi, Ārapiki, Wīwī, Itariana, Pōtikī, me ētahi atu.

speed.q: He aha te Speed Streak i te reo {langName}?
speed.a: Ko te Speed Streak he aratau Wordle wā-tepe i te reo {langName}. Ka tīmata ki te 3 meneti, ā, me whakatau kupu e nui ana i mua i te mutunga o te wā. Whakatau tere kia nui ake te wā tāpiri.
Ka whiwhi koe i ngā kohi mō ia kupu ka oti. Iti iho ngā matapaki, tere ake te whakatau, nui ake ngā kohi. Hangaia he combo mā te whakatau kupu ā-raupapa — kia 3x te whakarea.

speed.q: He aha ka mutu te wā?
speed.a: Ka mutu te kēmu, ā, ka kite koe i tō kaute whakamutunga, ngā kupu katoa i oti, te combo nui rawa, me te toharite matapaki. Ka taea te tākaro anō.

speed.q: He kore utu te Speed Streak?
speed.a: Āe. He kore utu katoa a Speed Streak i ngā reo 80+ katoa. Kāore he pūkete, kāore he tikiake e hiahiatia ana.

multiboard.q: He aha te {modeName} i te reo {langName}?
multiboard.a: Ko te {modeName} he momo Wordle papa-maha i te reo {langName}. Ka whakatau koe i ngā papa Wordle e {boardCount} i te wā kotahi mā ngā matapaki e {maxGuesses}. Ka puta ia matapaki ki ngā papa katoa kāore anō kia ea.

multiboard.q: E hia ngā matapaki ka whiwhi au i te {modeName}?
multiboard.a: Ka whiwhi koe i ngā matapaki e {maxGuesses} ki te whakatau i ngā papa e {boardCount} katoa. Ka tū maroke te papa kua ea, ā, ka taea e koe te arotahi ki ngā papa e toe ana.

multiboard.q: He aha te rautaki pai rawa mō te {modeName}?
multiboard.a: Tīmataria ki ngā kupu reta-nui hei kohikohi mōhiohio i ngā papa e {boardCount} katoa. Āta mātakitakihia te papapātuhi tae-wehewehe — ka whakaatu i ngā reta tika mō ia papa.
Āe. He kore utu katoa a {modeName} i ngā reo 80+ katoa. Kāore he pūkete, kāore he tikiake e hiahiatia ana. Tākaro i ngā rauna e hiahia ana koe.

howto.name: Patohia he kupu
howto.text: Patohia he kupu 5-reta tika i te reo {langName} mā te papapātuhi ā-mata, kātahi ka pēhi i te Enter.

howto.name: Pānuitia ngā tohutohu
howto.text: Ko ngā tapawhā kākāriki, kei te tūranga tika te reta. Ko te kōwhai, kei roto te reta i te kupu engari kei te tūranga hē. Ko te kerei, kāore te reta i roto i te kupu.

howto.name: Whakataua i ngā matapaki e 6
howto.text: Whakamahia ngā tohutohu tae hei whāiti i te kupu. E 6 ō matapaki. I muri i te pakanga, tirohia ō tatauranga, ā, tohatoha i tō hua.

unlimited.name: Tīmataria he kēmu
unlimited.text: Haere ki wordle.global/{lang}/unlimited ki te tīmata tākaro i te Wordle Mutunga-kore i te reo {langName}. Ka kōwhiria he kupu 5-reta mōu.

unlimited.name: Matapakihia te kupu
unlimited.text: Patohia he kupu 5-reta tika, kātahi ka pēhi i te Enter. Ko ngā tapawhā kākāriki, kei te tūranga tika. Ko te kōwhai, kei roto i te kupu engari kei te tūranga hē. Ko te kerei, kāore i roto i te kupu.

unlimited.name: Tākaro anō
unlimited.text: I muri i te whakatau (me ngā matapaki e 6 rānei), pēhia "Tākaro Anō" kia whiwhi kupu hou. Kāore e tatari ki āpōpō.

speed.name: Tīmataria te karaka
speed.text: Haere ki wordle.global/{lang}/speed, kātahi ka pēhi i te Tīmata. Ka tīmata ki te 3 meneti.

speed.name: Whakataua ngā kupu tere
speed.text: Ka whiwhi koe i te wā tāpiri mō ia kupu ka oti (+10s ki +60s, i runga i te tokoiti o ngā matapaki). Ka ngaro 30 hēkona mēnā ka hē.

speed.name: Hangaia tō combo
speed.text: Whakataua ngā kupu ā-raupapa hei hanga whakarea combo (kia 3x). Ka whati te combo mēnā ka hē. Ngana ki te whakahinga i tō kaute teitei.

multiboard.name: Tīmataria he kēmu
multiboard.text: Haere ki wordle.global/{lang}/{modeName} ki te tākaro i te {modeName} i te reo {langName}. E {boardCount} ngā papa me ngā kupu huna rerekē.

multiboard.name: Matapakihia i ngā papa katoa
multiboard.text: Patohia he kupu 5-reta, kātahi ka pēhi i te Enter. Ka puta tō matapaki i ngā papa e {boardCount} katoa. Ka whakaatu ia papa i ōna ake tohutohu tae (kākāriki, kōwhai, kerei).

multiboard.name: Whakataua ngā papa e {boardCount} katoa
multiboard.text: Ka tū maroke ngā papa kua ea. Whakamahia te papapātuhi tae-wehewehe hei aroturuki i ngā reta mō ia papa. Whakataua ngā papa e {boardCount} katoa i roto i ngā matapaki e {maxGuesses} kia toa.

ui.word_info_desc: Whakamārama me te toi AI i muri i te kēmu
ui.install_app_desc: Tākaro tuimotu me te tohu taupānga
ui.play_more_languages: Tākaro atu anō ngā reo kia kite i ō tatauranga whānui!
ui.play_daily_like_app: Tākaro Wordle ia rā pēnei i te taupānga
ui.no_games_yet: Kāore anō koe kia tākaro. Kōwhiria he reo ki te tīmata!
ui.easy_desc: Ka whakaaetia ngā kupu katoa, ahakoa kāore i te papakupu
ui.normal_desc: Me kupu tika ngā matapaki mai i te papakupu
ui.hard_desc: Me whakamahi ngā tohutohu kua kitea i ngā matapaki e whai ake ana
ui.high_contrast_desc: Tae hoa mō te kūare tae
ui.todays_word_reveal: Te kupu o tēnei rā — Tākaro kia kite!
ui.future_word: Kāore anō tēnei kupu kia tākaro. Hoki mai ā muri!
ui.first_to_play: Tuatahi ki te tākaro i tēnei rā!
ui.daily_words_counting: kupu ia rā, ā, kei te piki tonu
ui.difficulty_locked: Kāore e taea te huri i te taumaha i muri i te matapaki
ui.streak_footer: Streak counts classic daily puzzles in any language. Play once a day to keep it going.
ui.mode_daily_desc: One word per day. 6 guesses. The classic.
ui.mode_unlimited_desc: Random words, no limit. Play as much as you want.
ui.mode_speed_desc: Race the clock. Solve as many words as you can before time runs out.
ui.mode_custom_desc: Pick a word, share a link. Challenge your friends.
ui.mode_party_desc: Play the same word with friends. See who solves it fastest.
ui.homepage_tagline: Te kēmu kupu o te ao
ui.homepage_languages_counting: reo, ā, e piki haere ana — ka tāpiritia i ngā wā katoa.
ui.homepage_and_more_desc: Octordle, Semantic Explorer, Custom Word, Party Mode — me ētahi atu ā tōna.
